title: Lint
description: A Big Tech & Magic Content Mod for Fabric
body:
Lint 2 is an exciting Magic and Tech based Content mod for fabric. it adds an new dimension known as the haykam dimension for you to explore and roam with plenty of biomes and music to enjoy. It also has tech mod elements such as smelting of metals to allow for crafting more powerful armor, tools and other items. And the best part of the mod is that it adds tiny potatoes!
